message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from london liverpool street and should leave on saturday
The train should leave after 08:30 and should go to cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 7 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 4 and should be in the expensive price range
The hotel should include free parking and should be in the type of hotel
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 2 nights starting from the same day
If the booking fails how about 1 nights
Make sure you get the reference number
